# AT&T Business

## RSA 2026
- **Booth number and hall:** AT&T Business is a Gold Sponsor at RSA Conference 2026. Specific booth number and hall information for AT&T Business at RSA Conference 2026 is not publicly available in the search results.
- **Any updated booth info from the conference floor:** Information directly from the conference floor is not available through general web search at this time.

## Company Profile
- **Employee count (approximate):** As of fiscal year 2026, AT&T Inc. had approximately 133,030 employees.
- **Founded year:** AT&T Inc. was formally established in 2005 when SBC Communications acquired AT&T Corp. and adopted the AT&T name. However, its origins trace back to the Bell Telephone Company, founded in 1877, and the American Telephone and Telegraph Company (AT&T), incorporated in 1885 to build the first long-distance telephone network.
- **HQ location:** AT&T's global headquarters is currently located at Whitacre Tower in Downtown Dallas, Texas. However, AT&T announced in January 2026 that it plans to move its global headquarters from Downtown Dallas to a new corporate campus in Plano, Texas, with partial occupancy targeted for late 2028.
- **Funding stage or public status / ARR if known:** AT&T Inc. is a public company, trading on the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) under the ticker symbol "T". Its market capitalization was $186.83 billion, and it reported revenues of $125.6 billion in 2025.
- **Website URL:** att.com/business

## Technology Stack
- **Core technology and architecture:** AT&T Business focuses on network-embedded security, integrating security directly into its network infrastructure. This approach leverages fiber and 5G networks, software-defined networking (SDN), and a multi-layered security framework to create "clean pipes" with real-time visibility into network traffic. Their architecture includes virtualized network nodes that can be quickly isolated or patched, and they utilize SD-WAN for secure, dynamic, and application-aware traffic management.
- **AI/ML frameworks or capabilities used:** AT&T extensively uses Artificial Intelligence (AI) and Machine Learning (ML) for various security and network operations. These capabilities are applied to threat prevention, detection, and automated risk response, acting as an intelligent, ML/AI-driven firewall.
